name: Ollama_Phishing_Analysis
author: 33k
description: Sends a raw .eml file's headers and body to a self-hosted Ollama LLM for a phishing/social-engineering verdict, as a signal alongside the stock threat-intel analyzers.

configurationItems.name: ollama_host
configurationItems.description: Hostname or IP of the GPU box's Ollama instance

configurationItems.name: model
configurationItems.description: Ollama model name to use for analysis (must already be pulled on the GPU box)

configurationItems.name: timeout
configurationItems.description: Seconds to wait for Ollama's response before giving up - raise this for larger/slower models
